turns.user_message: I used to be so much more confident in myself. Now I just feel unsure about everything I do.
That old confidence feels like it belonged to a different person. I constantly doubt my own thoughts and feelings now.
I don't even recognize who I am anymore because I feel so worthless. That person I used to be feels completely gone.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by contrasting with how things used to be.
